instant.evidence: Scheduled daily batch report (weekday cron); not a latency-bound interactive surface.

natural.evidence: Deterministic data report (HTML scorecard + JSON), not a natural-language conversational surface; no NL generation.

permitted.evidence: Email delivery gated by PRODUCTIVITY_REPORT_DELIVERY=1 (off by default) to a fixed recipient list (config/report_recipients.json), always BCC ali@colaberry.com. Reads local sources (todo mirrors, .claude/session-state.json, the _cb_mentions cursor, optional ai_signals.json, comment_stats.json) plus a read-only `git log` and read-only Basecamp Comment GETs via the shared CB System token to compute the comment-based AI Share. All reads are non-mutating; the only write to Basecamp is the gated email path. Every signal source is optional.

adaptive.evidence: Deterministic heuristic scorer; thresholds are config (env), not learned. Baseline is computed once and cached.

contextual.evidence: Grounds every verdict in real Basecamp completion data: post-launch 7-day window vs a pre-launch baseline, deduped by task id. Completions are classified ai_assisted / human_only / attribution_unknown from local AI signals, and the verdict is gated on attribution_confidence so a measurement gap is never rendered as a behavioural verdict.

transparent.evidence: Writes an HTML report + JSON sidecar per run, surfaces assumptions and low-confidence baseline flags, and logs operators/verdict/delivery/path.

governance.evidence: Off-by-default delivery flag is the human approval gate; fixed recipient list; EXCLUDE_PROJECTS scoping; scheduler max_instances=1.

observability.evidence: Per-day HTML + JSON artifacts under output/ops/_productivity/, a ReportResult return, and INFO logs.

availability.evidence: Manual CLI fallback; scheduler job replace_existing; email failure is non-fatal (report still on disk); baseline caching.

lexicon.evidence: Standardized verdict vocabulary (GREEN/AMBER/RED/NODATA) and consistent metric names across report and sidecar. Enforced fleet-wide by the canonical glossary (config/lexicon.json) via the deterministic checker execution/ops_platform/lexicon.py and the scripts/lexicon_check.py CI gate; this artifact passes with zero forbidden-term or drift violations.

solid.evidence: Fully deterministic (no LLM); dedupe by task id; baseline caching; low-confidence flagging; email non-fatal.

layers.name: Multi-Modal Storage
layers.how: Reads local BC todo mirrors; writes HTML + JSON report artifacts + baseline snapshot.

layers.name: Intelligent Retrieval (RAG)
layers.how: Aggregates real completion data into the pre/post-launch comparison.

layers.name: Agent-Aware Governance
layers.how: Delivery behind an off-by-default flag + fixed recipient list.

layers.name: Observability & Feedback
layers.how: Daily report artifacts + JSON sidecar + logs.

notes: Deterministic, no LLM. Autonomous email send is gated off-by-default (PRODUCTIVITY_REPORT_DELIVERY) to a fixed internal recipient list - the env flag is the approval gate. 2026-06-26 (CC-20260626-PROD): attribution reworked - AI Share is now comment authorship (AI-posted vs hand-typed comments, classified from text since Basecamp has no AI comment account / no bot flag), with the completion three-bucket confidence-gated model as fallback; adds read-only signal harvesting (session-state, _cb_mentions, git provenance) and read-only Basecamp Comment GETs via the shared CB System token. Trust posture unchanged: still deterministic, no LLM, delivery still gated off, only non-mutating reads plus the gated email. Re-confirmed by Ali Muwwakkil 2026-06-26.
